suggestions.topic: Hegotá headliner final decision: Frame Transactions vs no EL headliner
suggestions.rationale: Decision explicitly deferred from ACDE #231 with deadline at this call (March 12). Main debate narrowed to Frame Transactions vs no headliner, though Lucid and SSZ remain under consideration. Client positions documented but no consensus reached.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-3 launch status and initial observations
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 launched March 5 (one week ago) with EIP-7954 (contract size), downscoped EIP-8037 (static state cost increase), and optional EIP-7975/8159 (ETH/70-71). Critical to assess if testing is progressing as expected before considering broader fork scope.

ACDE #231 action item to schedule breakout call before this meeting (deadline March 12). Need to hear results of deeper technical discussion, particularly addressing concerns about over-engineering and protocol signature removal implications.

suggestions.topic: Lucid encrypted mempool metadata leakage resolution
suggestions.rationale: Lucid team was assigned to address metadata leakage questions in Discord thread after ACDE #231. Since Lucid remains a headliner candidate alongside Frame, understanding resolution of privacy concerns is important for final decision.

suggestions.topic: BAL optimizations implementation progress toward end-of-February deadline
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #229 set end of February deadline for batch read optimizations and core BAL work to enable repricing benchmarking before April Interop events. With deadline passed (now March 10), need status update on whether clients met benchmarking requirements.

suggestions.topic: Txpool namespace standardization PR review status
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #231 requested client review and comments on txpool namespace standardization PR. While not blocking, standardization would improve cross-client consistency. Brief update on whether consensus emerged.

suggestions.topic: bal-devnet-4+ scope discussion: data repricing readiness
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #230 noted data repricing was deferred to DevNet-4+. With DevNet-3 launched and BAL optimization deadline passed, teams may want to discuss whether data repricing work is ready to scope for next devnet iteration.
